comments.body:
## Symphony operator stop

Rule ID: operator.stop

Failure class: policy

Stopped by dashboard control.

Unblock action: Move the issue back to an active state when it should run again.

issue.description:
## Description

- Keep this as a small deterministic repo-local change to prove merge-window workload shaping on a real run.

## Acceptance Criteria

- Add or update a unit test that proves the default search radius is 25 miles.
- Do not change the visible app behavior beyond the regression-proof change.
- Keep the change small and repo-local.

## Validation

- The existing Symphony validation and smoke commands pass.
issue.title: Add a regression test for AppSettings default search radius

acceptance_criteria: Add or update a unit test that proves the default search radius is 25 miles.
Do not change the visible app behavior beyond the regression-proof change.
Keep the change small and repo-local.
